Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study
(Adi Shankara Bhashya)
001
ॐ विश्वाय नमः Om Vishwamḥ Namaḥ
Universe
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
002
ॐ विष्णवे नमः Om Vishnuḥ Namaḥ
All-Pervading One
This name represents the divine consciousness that holds and nourishes all beings. It teaches us that selfless service and compassion are the highest forms of worship.
Contemplating this name fills the heart with universal love and gratitude.
003
ॐ वषट्काराय नमः Om Vashatkaaraḥ Namaḥ
Lord of Sacrificial Invocation
This name symbolizes the all-pervading sustenance and constant nourishment of the universe. In meditation, this attribute reminds us of the protective force that sustains our existence.
Chanting this name cultivates a deep sense of security, contentment, and peace.
004
ॐ भूत-भव्य-भवत्-प्रभवे नमः Om Bhuta-bhavya-bhavat-prabhuḥ Namaḥ
Lord of Time
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
005
ॐ भूतकृते नमः Om Bhutakritḥ Namaḥ
Creator of All Beings
This name represents the supreme architect of the universe and the dawn of life. This attribute reminds us that our inner consciousness is the mother of all thoughts.
Focusing on this divine form purifies the mind and fills it with creative clarity.
Antara Digital Sanctuary
Name 5
Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study
(Adi Shankara Bhashya)
006
ॐ भूतभृते नमः Om Bhutabhritḥ Namaḥ
Sustainer of All Beings
This name symbolizes the all-pervading sustenance and constant nourishment of the universe. In meditation, this attribute reminds us of the protective force that sustains our existence.
Chanting this name cultivates a deep sense of security, contentment, and peace.
007
ॐ भावाय नमः Om Bhavaḥ Namaḥ
Pure Existence
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
008
ॐ भूतात्मने नमः Om Bhutatmaḥ Namaḥ
Soul of All Beings
This name denotes the highest ideal of meditation, yoga, and inner focus. It teaches that stability of mind and looking inward are essential for spiritual discovery.
Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.
009
ॐ भूतभावनाय नमः Om Bhutabhavanaḥ Namaḥ
Nourisher of All Creations
This name symbolizes the all-pervading sustenance and constant nourishment of the universe. In meditation, this attribute reminds us of the protective force that sustains our existence.
Chanting this name cultivates a deep sense of security, contentment, and peace.
010
ॐ पूतात्मने नमः Om Putatmaḥ Namaḥ
Purest Soul
This name represents the illuminator of intellect and the source of ultimate wisdom. Spiritually, it dispels the darkness of ignorance and kindles the light of discernment.
Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.
Antara Digital Sanctuary
Name 10
Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study
(Adi Shankara Bhashya)
011
ॐ परमात्मने नमः Om Paramatmaḥ Namaḥ
Supreme Soul
This name denotes the highest ideal of meditation, yoga, and inner focus. It teaches that stability of mind and looking inward are essential for spiritual discovery.
Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.
012
ॐ मुक्तानां परमा गतये नमः Om Muktanam Parama Gatiḥ Namaḥ
Ultimate Goal of Liberated Souls
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
013
ॐ अव्ययाय नमः Om Avyayaḥ Namaḥ
Imperishable One
This name symbolizes the controller of time and the power to transcend material limits. Spiritually, it clears away old patterns, ego, and negativity.
Contemplating this quality guides the seeker toward detachment and profound inner purification.
014
ॐ पुरुषाय नमः Om Purushaḥ Namaḥ
Supreme Being
This name represents the divine consciousness that holds and nourishes all beings. It teaches us that selfless service and compassion are the highest forms of worship.
Contemplating this name fills the heart with universal love and gratitude.
015
ॐ साक्षिणे नमः Om Sakshiḥ Namaḥ
Eternal Witness
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.

(Adi Shankara Bhashya)
016
ॐ क्षेत्रज्ञाय नमः Om Kshetrajnaḥ Namaḥ
Knower of the Field
This name represents the illuminator of intellect and the source of ultimate wisdom. Spiritually, it dispels the darkness of ignorance and kindles the light of discernment.
Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.
017
ॐ अक्षराय नमः Om Aksharaḥ Namaḥ
Undecaying One
This name represents the absolute peace and dissolution of the material world where all dualities cease. It teaches us that letting go of desires is the gateway to eternal tranquility.
Meditating on this quality brings silent, undisturbed awareness.
018
ॐ योगाय नमः Om Yogaḥ Namaḥ
Path of Union
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
019
ॐ योगविदां नेत्रे नमः Om Yogavidaam Netaḥ Namaḥ
Leader of Yoga Knowers
This name represents the illuminator of intellect and the source of ultimate wisdom. Spiritually, it dispels the darkness of ignorance and kindles the light of discernment.
Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.
020
ॐ प्रधानपुरुषेश्वराय नमः Om Pradhana-purusheshvaraḥ Namaḥ
Lord of Nature and Spirit
This name denotes the highest ideal of meditation, yoga, and inner focus. It teaches that stability of mind and looking inward are essential for spiritual discovery.
Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.

This name represents the absolute peace and dissolution of the material world where all dualities cease. It teaches us that letting go of desires is the gateway to eternal tranquility.
Meditating on this quality brings silent, undisturbed awareness.
027

Auspicious One
This name signifies the divine splendor, inner light, and supreme glory. It shows that the radiance of the soul is brighter than the sun, instantly dispelling spiritual darkness.
Contemplating this quality fills the seeker with vitality and spiritual glow.
028

Unmoving Pillar
This name symbolizes the supreme auspiciousness, peace, and benevolent energy. In spiritual practice, this attribute ward off negativity and ushers in divine grace and joy.
Meditating on this name aligns one with the blessings of the cosmos.

Source of All Beings

Focusing on this divine form purifies the mind and fills it with creative clarity.

031

This name highlights the divine creative power and the source of the universe. On the spiritual path, it teaches that every creation is an extension of the Divine.
Meditating on this name allows the seeker to align with cosmic harmony and appreciate the flow of life.

(Adi Shankara Bhashya)
041
ॐ महास्वनाय नमः Om Mahasvanaḥ Namaḥ
Mighty Sound
This name highlights the compassionate power that responds to the call of seekers and removes obstacles. It teaches that complete trust in the divine presence dispels all anxiety.
Remembering this name fills the heart with joy and gratitude.
042
ॐ अनादिनिधनाय नमः Om Anaadi-nidhanaḥ Namaḥ
Without Beginning or End
This name signifies the transformation of physical forms and the ultimate freedom of the soul. It teaches that dissolution is merely a transition, while the consciousness remains immortal.
Meditating on this name liberates the seeker from attachment.

Focusing on this divine form purifies the mind and fills it with creative clarity.
045

Contemplating this attribute cultivates creative energy and brings a fresh, divine perspective to life.

This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
082
ॐ कृतज्ञाय नमः Om Kritajnaḥ Namaḥ
Knower of Devotion
This name represents the illuminator of intellect and the source of ultimate wisdom. Spiritually, it dispels the darkness of ignorance and kindles the light of discernment.
Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.
083
ॐ कृतये नमः Om Kritiḥ Namaḥ
Source of Action
This name highlights the compassionate power that responds to the call of seekers and removes obstacles. It teaches that complete trust in the divine presence dispels all anxiety.
Remembering this name fills the heart with joy and gratitude.
084
ॐ आत्मवते नमः Om Atmavaanaḥ Namaḥ
Self-Possessed One
This name represents the imperishable, eternal, and transcendent reality beyond the senses. It shows that truth is beyond the limits of space, time, and matter, having no beginning or end.
Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.
085

This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.

This name represents the imperishable, eternal, and transcendent reality beyond the senses. It shows that truth is beyond the limits of space, time, and matter, having no beginning or end.
Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.
163
ॐ वैद्याय नमः Om Vaidyaḥ Namaḥ
One to be Known
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
164
ॐ सदायोगिने नमः Om Sadayogiḥ Namaḥ
Supreme Physician
This name denotes the highest ideal of meditation, yoga, and inner focus. It teaches that stability of mind and looking inward are essential for spiritual discovery.
Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.
165
ॐ वीरहने नमः Om Virahaḥ Namaḥ
Perpetual Yogi
This name signifies the transformation of physical forms and the ultimate freedom of the soul. It teaches that dissolution is merely a transition, while the consciousness remains immortal.
Meditating on this name liberates the seeker from attachment.

This name signifies the transformation of physical forms and the ultimate freedom of the soul. It teaches that dissolution is merely a transition, while the consciousness remains immortal.
Meditating on this name liberates the seeker from attachment.
244
ॐ नारायणाय नमः Om Narayanaḥ Namaḥ
Dissolver of Creation
This name represents the illuminator of intellect and the source of ultimate wisdom. Spiritually, it dispels the darkness of ignorance and kindles the light of discernment.
Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.
245
ॐ नराय नमः Om Naraḥ Namaḥ
Ultimate Refuge of Humanity
This name represents the absolute peace and dissolution of the material world where all dualities cease. It teaches us that letting go of desires is the gateway to eternal tranquility.
Meditating on this quality brings silent, undisturbed awareness.

Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.

Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.
403
ॐ धर्माय नमः Om Dharmaḥ Namaḥ
Dharma Itself
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
404
ॐ धर्मविदुत्तमाय नमः Om Dharmaviduttamaḥ Namaḥ
Best Among Knowers of Dharma
This name denotes the highest ideal of meditation, yoga, and inner focus. It teaches that stability of mind and looking inward are essential for spiritual discovery.
Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.
405

Safe-Keeper of Cosmic Movement
This name symbolizes the all-pervading sustenance and constant nourishment of the universe. In meditation, this attribute reminds us of the protective force that sustains our existence.
Chanting this name cultivates a deep sense of security, contentment, and peace.

Thousand-Rayed Luminary
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
484
ॐ विधात्रे नमः Om Vidhaataḥ Namaḥ
Dispenser of Fruits of Action
This name highlights the divine creative power and the source of the universe. On the spiritual path, it teaches that every creation is an extension of the Divine.
Meditating on this name allows the seeker to align with cosmic harmony and appreciate the flow of life.
485
ॐ कृतलक्षणाय नमः Om Kritalakshanaḥ Namaḥ
Definer of Cosmic Marks
This name reveals the infinite majesty, beauty, and dignity of the Supreme Lord. It inspires the seeker to see the divine presence in the beauty of the universe.
Meditating on this form elevates the mind to states of reverence and awe.

This name symbolizes the supreme auspiciousness, peace, and benevolent energy. In spiritual practice, this attribute ward off negativity and ushers in divine grace and joy.
Meditating on this name aligns one with the blessings of the cosmos.

Contemplating this quality fills the seeker with vitality and spiritual glow.

Contemplating this quality guides the seeker toward detachment and profound inner purification.

This name reveals the infinite majesty, beauty, and dignity of the Supreme Lord. It inspires the seeker to see the divine presence in the beauty of the universe.
Meditating on this form elevates the mind to states of reverence and awe.
720
ॐ अमूर्तिमते नमः Om Amurthimanaḥ Namaḥ

This name represents the imperishable, eternal, and transcendent reality beyond the senses. It shows that truth is beyond the limits of space, time, and matter, having no beginning or end.
Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.

ॐ प्राणदाय नमः Om Pranadaḥ Namaḥ
Giver of Life-Force
This name represents the supreme architect of the universe and the dawn of life. This attribute reminds us that our inner consciousness is the mother of all thoughts.
Focusing on this divine form purifies the mind and fills it with creative clarity.
957
ॐ प्रणवाय नमः Om Pranavaḥ Namaḥ
Sacred Sound Om
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
958
ॐ पणाय नमः Om Panaḥ Namaḥ
Cosmic Dealer Appraising Deeds
This name symbolizes the supreme auspiciousness, peace, and benevolent energy. In spiritual practice, this attribute ward off negativity and ushers in divine grace and joy.
Meditating on this name aligns one with the blessings of the cosmos.
959
ॐ प्रमाणाय नमः Om Pramanamḥ Namaḥ
Ultimate Authority and Proof
This name highlights the compassionate power that responds to the call of seekers and removes obstacles. It teaches that complete trust in the divine presence dispels all anxiety.
Remembering this name fills the heart with joy and gratitude.
960
ॐ प्राणनिलयाय नमः Om Prana-nilayaḥ Namaḥ
Reservoir where Energies Merge
This name represents the imperishable, eternal, and transcendent reality beyond the senses. It shows that truth is beyond the limits of space, time, and matter, having no beginning or end.
Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.

Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.

Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.

This name highlights the compassionate power that responds to the call of seekers and removes obstacles. It teaches that complete trust in the divine presence dispels all anxiety.
Remembering this name fills the heart with joy and gratitude.

Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
970

Meditating on this name allows the seeker to align with cosmic harmony and appreciate the flow of life.
